## Book Chapters

::: {.publication-list}

1. **Roque, N.A.**, & Germine, L.T. (2026). Digital Neuropsychology and the Assessment of Cognitive Change. Neuropsychology in the Age of Digital Health: Exploration, Application, and Practical Implementation.
1. Sliwinski, M.J., **Roque, N.A.**, Harrington, K. (2023). Cognition on the go: Opportunities and Challenges for Mobile Cognitive Health Research. Mobile Sensing in Psychology: Methods and Applications.
1. **Roque, N. A.**, & Boot, W. R. (2018). Action video games DO NOT promote visual attention. In Video game influences on aggression, cognition, and attention (pp. 105-118). Springer, Cham.
1. **Roque, N.A.**, Boot, W.R. (2017). Cognitive Aging. International Handbook of Positive Aging.  London and New York: Routledge.

:::
